name: moodler-mcp
description: Moodle LMS MCP server — browse courses, assignments, grades, and downloads from your Moodle instance via AI assistants.
long_description:
moodler-mcp connects your AI assistant to your own Moodle instance so you can ask natural-language questions about your coursework.

**What you can do**

- *"What's due this week?"* — pulls deadlines from your calendar and assignment list.
- *"What do I need to do for my INT212 project?"* — reads the assignment page and returns the full spec.
- *"Why are my grades in INT201 low?"* — scrapes your user grade report and summarises what's posted.
- *"Download the week 4 lecture slides and summarise them."* — fetches PDFs through Moodle's resource redirect chain and reads them directly.
- *"Find student Jane Doe in the CS department."* — teacher-facing student search when you're logged in as staff.

Authentication is handled via a local browser-based SSO flow (Playwright) — no API tokens or institutional secrets required. Your session cookie stays on your machine. No telemetry, no external transmission beyond your own Moodle instance. See the privacy policy for details.

moodle_url.title: Moodle URL
moodle_url.description: Base URL of your Moodle instance (e.g. https://moodle.example.edu), no trailing slash. On first run, a Chromium window will open so you can complete SSO; the session is cached locally for subsequent runs.
